NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"stake(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of xStock tokens to stake (18 dec).","token":"xStock token address (e.g. wQQQx)."},"returns":{"gridTokensMinted":" GridTokens received (18 dec = USDC value)."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"unstake(address,uint256)":{"params":{"gridTokenAmount":"GridTokens to burn (18 dec).","token":"xStock token address."},"returns":{"collateralOut":"  xStock tokens returned (18 dec)."}}},"stateVariables":{"positions":{"details":"user => xStockToken => Position"}},"title":"xStockVault","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getAvailableGridTokens(address,address)":{"notice":"How many more GridTokens can be minted against current collateral."},"getCollateralValue(address,address)":{"notice":"Current USDC value of staked collateral."},"getHealthFactor(address,address)":{"notice":"Health factor as BPS. >= 10_000 = safe.         health = (collateralUsdcValue \u00d7 LIQ_THRESHOLD) / gridTokensMintedUsdc"},"liquidate(address,address)":{"notice":"Liquidate an undercollateralised position.         Callable by anyone when:           gridTokensMinted > collateralUsdcValue \u00d7 78%         Liquidator repays all GridTokens, receives collateral + 5% bonus."},"stake(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Stake real xStock tokens, receive GridTokens = 70% of stake value.         Example: stake 1 wQQQx worth $480           \u2192 mints 336 gxQQQx GridTokens (= $336 play credit)"},"unstake(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Unstake xStock tokens by burning GridTokens.         Burns proportional GridTokens and returns proportional collateral.         Example: staked 1 wQQQx, received 336 gxQQQx.           Burn 336 gxQQQx \u2192 get back 1 wQQQx.           Burn 168 gxQQQx \u2192 get back 0.5 wQQQx."}},"notice":"Stake real xStock tokens (wQQQx, wSPYx, \u2026) to get GridTokens.  FLOW  ----  1. User wins GridTokens on the grid.  2. User redeems GridTokens \u2192 USDC (via xStocksGrid.redeemForUsdc).  3. Backend calls xChange API \u2192 swaps USDC \u2192 real xQQQ \u2192 sent to user's wallet.  4. User now holds real wQQQx (from Backed).  5. User calls stake(wQQQx, amount):       \u2192 Locks wQQQx as collateral       \u2192 Mints 70% of its USDC value as gxQQQx GridTokens       \u2192 User plays the grid again with fresh GridTokens  6. To unlock: call unstake(wQQQx, amount) \u2014 burns proportional GridTokens.  EXAMPLE  -------  wQQQx price = $480.  User stakes 1 wQQQx.    Collateral value = 1 \u00d7 $480 = $480 USDC    GridTokens minted = $480 \u00d7 70% = 336 GridTokens (gxQQQx)    (each GridToken = $1, so 336 GridTokens = $336 of play credit)  LIQUIDATION  -----------  If wQQQx price drops so that:    gridTokensMinted > collateralUsdcValue \u00d7 LIQ_THRESHOLD (78%)  the position can be liquidated. Liquidator repays GridTokens,  receives the collateral + 5% bonus.  RATES  -----  STAKE_LTV_BPS       70%  \u2014 GridTokens minted = collateral \u00d7 70%  LIQ_THRESHOLD_BPS   78%  \u2014 liquidation trigger  LIQ_BONUS_BPS        5%  \u2014 liquidator reward","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"xStockVault.sol":"xStockVault"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"GridMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9b30dbdd7cb21b74885c01bd93df09bbaac6bbdf7f209b6ae0713abfe611d523","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2d5161de296501318fd90f8aacf7a7787e5a64a1065235c14491388760b45238","dweb:/ipfs/QmZQpnp2QZapQuexggGVXiqQkPhQM1t5ojHektXSkq4v7U"]},"GridToken.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb0795e416b87c7f2e5fdf67a9e9882ff5ae891feacaa2975f95a794583a4ed43","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d1f731e07d95e700d40bad1842d52dcabef9b088a50dd134f1d519558066b95d","dweb:/ipfs/QmXzwwwkYhGRTTGQgk7w28BQigakXjC4GC37WM7NtQ3tD8"]},"PriceFeed.sol":{"keccak256":"0x909895a63ba291dcab9f11c6aff857fc844491c9b49563331d0ebb61eca18b94","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://db981d3a4ef8a014ef0d6dbe54bab65c78fd14820e96926f53b1e32ce83afc4d","dweb:/ipfs/QmRoJmQZDrs2MQfic49zKuykhn9FgEaVurf4kUi2EcHGPR"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/Ownable.sol":{"keccak256":"0xff6d0bb2e285473e5311d9d3caacb525ae3538a80758c10649a4d61029b017bb","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8ed324d3920bb545059d66ab97d43e43ee85fd3bd52e03e401f020afb0b120f6","dweb:/ipfs/QmfEckWLmZkDDcoWrkEvMWhms66xwTLff9DDhegYpvHo1a"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC1363.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd5ea07362ab630a6a3dee4285a74cf2377044ca2e4be472755ad64d7c5d4b69d","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://da5e832b40fc5c3145d3781e2e5fa60ac2052c9d08af7e300dc8ab80c4343100","dweb:/ipfs/QmTzf7N5ZUdh5raqtzbM11yexiUoLC9z3Ws632MCuycq1d"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfac owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.amount: Amount of xStock tokens to stake (18 dec).

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

getAvailableGridTokens(address,address).notice: How many more GridTokens can be minted against current collateral.

getCollateralValue(address,address).notice: Current USDC value of staked collateral.

getHealthFactor(address,address).notice: Health factor as BPS. >= 10_000 = safe.         health = (collateralUsdcValue × LIQ_THRESHOLD) / gridTokensMintedUsdc

liquidate(address,address).notice: Liquidate an undercollateralised position.         Callable by anyone when:           gridTokensMinted > collateralUsdcValue × 78%         Liquidator repays all GridTokens, receives collateral + 5% bonus.

stake(address,uint256).notice: Stake real xStock tokens, receive GridTokens = 70% of stake value.         Example: stake 1 wQQQx worth $480           → mints 336 gxQQQx GridTokens (= $336 play credit)

unstake(address,uint256).notice: Unstake xStock tokens by burning GridTokens.         Burns proportional GridTokens and returns proportional collateral.         Example: staked 1 wQQQx, received 336 gxQQQx.           Burn 336 gxQQQx → get back 1 wQQQx.           Burn 168 gxQQQx → get back 0.5 wQQQx.
